html:
{% set company = frappe.get_doc("Company", doc.company) %} {% set employee = frappe.get_doc("Employee", doc.employee) %} {% set letter_head = frappe.get_doc("Letter Head", company.default_letter_head) %}
{% if letter_head.image %}
{% endif %}
Ref : {{ doc.name }}
Date : {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.offer_date, "dd/MM/yyyy") }}
Between : {{ doc.company }}
On the one hand, hereinafter called “the Employer”
And : {{ doc.applicant_name }}
Mob No. {{ frappe.db.get_value("Job Applicant", doc.job_applicant, "phone_number") or "" }}
Nationality: {{ doc.custom_applicant_nationality or "" }}
On the other hand, hereinafter called “the Employee”

The following is agreed:

1.  Function

The Company hereby agrees to employ the Employee, and the Employee hereby agrees to serve as an employee of the Company as {{ doc.designation }} with such duties and responsibilities as shall be specified from time to time by the Company. The Employee shall report to the reporting manager as assigned by Management.

2.  Country of Assignment

2.1.  The country of assignment will be the United Arab Emirates.

2.2.  The Employee may be required to work at any other place or location either on a temporary or permanent basis according to the Employer's requirements.

2.3.  The Employee shall be given reasonable notice of any change in the place of work.

2.4.  The Employee undertakes to travel to any destination as may be necessary for the fulfillment of his duties and/or as is reasonably required for the business of the Employer.

3.  Remuneration

3.1.  The Company shall remunerate the Employee monthly in arrears during the period of employment as follows:

{% set ns= namespace(total = 0) %} {% for row in doc.offer_terms %} {% set val = frappe.utils.flt(row.value) %} {% set ns.total = ns.total + val %} {% endfor %}
Wages Amount “AED”
{{ row.offer_term }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(val) }}
Total per month AED {{ "{:,.2f}".format(ns.total) }}
({{ frappe.utils.money_in_words(ns.total, "AED") }})

3.2.  The company shall provide employee with the Mobile, Mobile Sim for Official use only

3.3.  An economy class air ticket yearly will be paid by the company with continues service of {{doc.custom_air_ticket_entitlement_duration}} months. Amount should be AED {{ doc.custom_air_ticket_entitlement_cash_amount or 0 }} ({{ frappe.utils.money_in_words(doc.custom_air_ticket_entitlement_cash_amount or 0, "AED") }}) per year.

3.4.  The Employee’s remuneration under this clause shall be paid on monthly basis.

3.5.  The Company shall, to the extent permitted by the UAE Labor Law, be entitled to deduct from the Employee’s remuneration all sums from time to time owed by the Employee to the Company or such other deductions which the Company and the Employee have agreed to be made.

3.6.  Any liability for taxation, both on salary and benefits, in the country of your Employment and in the Employee's home country will be the Employee’s responsibility.

4.  Responsibilities

4.1.  The Employee shall at all times and in all aspects conform to and comply with the directions and regulations of the Company and the law and regulation of the country of assignment.

4.2.  The Employee shall, during his employment, well and faithfully serve the Company and in performance of the service, use his best endeavors to Promote, develop and extend the business and interests of the Company and shall devote his whole working time and attention to the duties necessary to provide the services to the Company.

4.3.  The Employee shall, at all times during the period that he is employed to provide the services:

4.3.1.  Uphold the interests of the Company to the best of his/her ability and do nothing to prejudice them at any time.

4.3.2.  Obey all lawful instructions and directions given by those representing company and have authority over the Employee.

4.3.3.  Observe all rules, regulations and policies governing this agreement and the provision of the services notified to the Employee by the Company from time to time.

4.3.4.  Not, without the permission of the Company, engage or be interested in or concerned directly or indirectly in any capacity whatsoever in any trade or professional business other than the provision of services to the Company.

4.3.5.  Abide by the Health, Safety, Energy, Environmental and Quality (HSEEQ) policy, procedures and any other applicable documents of the Company, necessary for the good conduct and safety of the workplace. The Employee shall seek clarification and guidance in specific cases or whenever one feels necessary.

4.3.6.  Abide by the Conflict-of-Interest Policy, Code of Conduct and internal rules of the Company notify the Employee from time to time.

5.  Term

This Employment Contract shall be for an unlimited period after completion of probationary period of six (06) Months.

6.  Working hours

6.1.  The Employee’s working hours shall be 48 hours per week, average as 8 hours per day over 12 months period, in accordance with the UAE Labour Law.

6.2.  Due to the nature of your position your working hours may vary to suit the needs of the business.

7.  Over time

If the Employee is eligible for overtime, the overtime will be paid as per UAE Labor Law and Company Policy. Over Time is subject to approval by the general manager.

8.  Probation Period

8.1.  The Employee shall work under a probation period of Six (06) months in accordance with the UAE Labour Law which is calculated from the commencement date of this Employment Contract.

8.2.  During the probation period the eligibility for sick leave & Paid leave will not apply.

8.3.  Termination by the Company: In the event of termination of the Employment during this probationary period, the Employee shall not be entitled to receive any end of service benefits or other compensation whatsoever.

8.4.  Resignation by the Employee: In the event of resignation during the probationary period, the Company reserves the right to recover all the costs incurred during the Employee’s employment, including relocation costs.

9.  Annual leave

9.1.  The Employee shall be entitled to the country national holidays announced for the private sector.

9.2.  The Employee is entitled to a paid annual leave of Thirty (30) Calendar days, as per UAE Labour Law.

9.3.  The annual leave is always subject to prior approval of the Company management.

9.4.  The leave must be taken during the assignment period after completion of the probation.

9.5.  Any entitlement to annual leave remaining at the end of the civil year shall lapse without entitlement to payment in lieu thereof unless otherwise agreed by the Company.

9.6.  For the first year of service, annual leave entitlement will be calculated on pro-rata.

9.7.  The Employee is expected to take the leave every year as it cannot be carried forward.

10.  Sick leave

Sick leave shall be granted in accordance with the UAE Labour Law.

The Employee (or someone on his behalf) must notify the Line Manager/HR Department on the first day of sickness and should provide the Company with a medical opinion, from an UAE approved and licensed practitioner that states the employee cannot fulfil the duties reasonably expected from his position due to sickness. The Employee agrees to consent to medical examinations (at the Company’s expense) by a doctor nominated by the Company, should the Company require. The Employee agrees that any report produced in connection with any such examination may be disclosed to the Company and the Company may discuss the contents of the report with the relevant medical practitioner.

11.  Health Insurance

11.1.  The company will arrange medical coverage for the Employee through private medical insurance provider according to the company policies as per the applicable Law in the Emirates of Abu Dhabi. Specific terms and conditions may change upon vendor’s decision

11.2.  This insurance will no longer apply, once the Employee resigns or the Employment is terminated “at last working day at closing business hours”.

12.  Life & Disability Insurance

Not Applicable. Employee shall be added in Workman compensation insurance.

13.  Regulatory Residence & Identity Permits

13.1.  This employment is dependent upon the following authority approvals:

13.1.1.  Being medically fit to reside and work in the UAE.

13.1.2.  Complying with all other requirements (if any) of the UAE Authorities arising out of employment with the Company and the provision of the Services.

13.1.3.  Providing the Company with all necessary documents required for the application of necessary residence and work permits.

13.1.4.  A residence visa and work permit being issued for the Employee by the immigration Department and Ministry of Labor respectively.

13.2.  In case the country authorities at any time of recruitment or later amend regulations requesting additional documentation, it shall be the Employee's responsibility to ensure procures or forwards information as required.

14.  Confidentiality

14.1.  During the term of this contract or at any time thereafter:

14.1.1.  The Employee hereby acknowledges that, during the employment with the Company, shall acquire knowledge with respect to certain information concerning the Company, its subsidiaries or its affiliates or the respective business or activities thereof, including, but not limited to, all and any information regarding the business, plans, maturing new business opportunities, research and development project, sales statistics, marketing services and plans, the names, addresses and contact details of the customers and potential customers or suppliers and potential suppliers, financial information (including, but not limited to, information concerning pricing of products or services, business and business operation and methods, costs of products or services, profit or loss and discount structures) and/or technical information (including, but not limited to, design specifications, instructions, processes, inventions, discoveries and know-how) (collectively, the “Confidential or Sensitive information”).

I.  Use any of the Confidential or Sensitive Information for the Employee's benefit or for the benefit of any individual, company, corporation, partnership, joint venture, firm, trust, association, state or governmental agency or other entity (each “Person”)

II.  Disclose any of Confidential or Sensitive Information to any Person except in the course of employment with the Company to the extent necessary to carry out the Employee’s duties under this Agreement.

III.  Upon termination of the Employee’s employment with the Company for any reason, the Employee shall immediately deliver to the company all records, notes, data, memoranda or any other materials of any nature that are in the possession, or under the control, of the Employee.

IV.  The Employee shall not publish any written work, deliver any lecture, discuss or debate in public nor give any interview to the press or other broadcast media on any subject related to the Company's, its subsidiaries or its affiliates business or the Employee’s work with the Company without prior approval.

15.  Intellectual Property

15.1.  The Employee shall not make any unauthorized copies or use any software used by the Company in breach of the terms of use applicable to such software.

15.2.  The Employee shall promptly and fully disclose to the Company all inventions, discoveries, concepts, products and ideas whether patentable or not, including but not limited to computer, hardware or apparatus, software, computer programs, designs, specifications and any know-how conceived during employment.

15.2.1.  Which is related to the Company's business activities.

15.2.2.  Results from work carried out using company resources.

15.2.3.  Which results from any specific project carried out by the Employee.

15.3.  The Employee shall assist the Company in obtaining intellectual property protection where required.

16.  Non-Disclosure Agreement

16.1.  The Employee will be expected to sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement as set out by the Company.

16.2.  All Employment and remuneration details must be considered confidential.

17.  Termination of Employment

17.1.  The contract may be terminated without notice during probation.

17.2.  Upon completion of probation period:

17.2.1.  Either party may terminate employment by giving three (3) months’ notice in writing, as per UAE Labour Law.

17.2.2  During the notice period, the employee agrees not to take up employment with any other organization.

17.2.3  Both parties could mutually agree to compensation “in lieu” of notice as per the UAE Labour Law.

17.2.4  The Company may dismiss the Employee without notice as provided in Article 88 through 120 of the Labor Law.

18.   Notice of Termination

18.1.  This Employment contract shall be terminated by the Company immediately as per the UAE Labour regulations and UAE Law including when the employee:

18.1.1. Is absent without permission.

18.1.2. Violating safety rules;

18.1.3. Is convicted of dishonesty;

18.1.4. Is intoxicated as a result of alcohol or drugs;

18.1.5. Refuses to work or comply with Company instruction.

In case of 18.1 above, the end of service benefits will not be payable.

19.   End of Service Gratuity

19.1.  On termination of service, the Company will accrue and pay gratuity in accordance with the provisions of the UAE Labor Law for the only duration of the present contract, notwithstanding the Employee's length of activity within the Group. At the time of this agreement, the following applies (inter alia).

19.2.  The payment of gratuity is applicable only if the Employee has completed one or more continuous years of service.

19.3.  The maximum gratuity is capped at two years of final basic salary.

19.4.  The payment of any gratuity will be forfeited if the employee is dismissed on disciplinary grounds pursuant to Articles 88 and 120 of the UAE Labor Law.

20.   Non-Competition/Solicitation

20.1.  The Employee expressly undertakes that shall not for a period of 24 months following the termination of this contract for whatever reason; Take up any form of employment in any industry that is related to the business.

I.  Orion Group of Companies in the UAE or which directly competes with the Company.

II. Contract or solicit business from any person or entity who was a client or customer of the Company.

III. Supply goods or services to any person who is, a supplier, customer or client of the Company.

IV. Solicit or endeavor to entice or discourage from being employed by the Company an employee of the Company whether or not such a person would commit a breach of contract by reason of leaving service or take action which is prejudicial to the name and or the trading position of the Company.

24.   Entire Agreement/Variations of Contract

This agreement incorporates the entire agreement between the Employee and the Company with respect to the subject matter hereof and supersedes and replaces all prior agreements, arrangements, undertakings or understanding whatsoever with regard to the subject matter covered herein. This Agreement may only be modified or varied by mutual agreement in writing.

25.   Governing law

This Agreement shall be governed by, construed and given effect to in accordance with the UAE Federal Law No. 8 of 1980 as amended (the “UAE Labour Law”) and the other applicable laws in force in the Emirate of Abu Dhabi. The Abu Dhabi courts shall have exclusive jurisdiction to hear disputes arising out of and/or relating to the Employee’s employment.

General

26.1.  Company Policies and Procedure are subject to review and may be revised from time to time based on needs of the business.

26.2.  The company reserves the right to relocate you within the Country of hire.

We take this opportunity to congratulate you on joining {{ doc.company }}. If you are in agreement with the above conditions, please sign and return one original of this letter.

Yours sincerely, I hereby accept the terms and conditions of this offer.

This offer will be valid for 3 days from the date of this letter. If this offer of employment is acceptable to you, please let us know your acceptance by confirming via email within 3 day of receiving this letter and providing a signed copy of this document by email. If we do not hear back from you within this period this offer will be deemed to be cancelled.

Yours Sincerely,

Saranya Sasidharan

HR Manager

Signature

I hereby accepted the term & condition of this offer

Ms. {{ doc.applicant_name }}

Signature:

{% if letter_head.footer_image %}
{% endif %}
name: Job Offer V1
